Featuring a faux marble finish on the tabletops and a sleek gold-tone metal frame, these tables offer a sophisticated look for modern interiors. Features Two tables nest together to save floor space when not in use, then separate to provide additional surface area for guests. Tabletops feature a realistic faux marble pattern that adds an elegant touch without the maintenance of natural stone. Constructed with a metal base finished in gold tone to complement modern and glam interior decor styles.
